name: Caprice
homeLede: A thick Maduro Gordito crafted for a stolen caprice. Cured to a deep sweetness, balancing warming spice with a velvety caramel cream.
Each Caprice is made from Havana-seed Criollo 98, hand-rolled in East Java from tobacco that the volcanic soil of East Java has made its own.
narrative: Darker by intent. A Maduro wrapper, roasted to a deeper sweetness, wraps a Gordito built short and thick. Spice opens, toasted nuts warm it through, and caramel rises to meet the cream. The leaf is Havana-seed Criollo 98, hand-rolled in Jember from tobacco the volcanic soil of East Java has made its own.
The 24-carat gold leaf laid by hand on every Mariposa is the brand's signature. It stands as a quiet reminder that the finer things in life are meant to be enjoyed.

specs.label: Construction
specs.value: Three-part · entubado bunching · Cuban triple cap

tasting.note: Spice opens the smoke, warmed through by a steady note of toasted nuts.
The spice softens as cream comes in, and a slow caramel sweetness builds underneath.
Spice returns alongside the nuts, the cream holds its line, and damp earth carries it home.
